ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the index for the report */,
  "is_meter" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is meter-based or not */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Sum, Average) */,
  "index_group" TEXT /* Group of the index the report belongs to */,
  "timestep_type" TEXT /* Type of timestep for data aggregation */,
  "key_value" TEXT /* Key value for identifying the specific zone */,
  "reporting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the report is generated */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule associated with the report */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the report data */,
  "report_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the reporting period */,
  "report_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the reporting period */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reports_key_value FOREIGN KEY ("key_value") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reports_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES reporting_frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zone's purpose or function */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the zone in square meters */,
  "occupancy" INTEGER /* Average number of occupants in the zone */,
  "equipment_ids" TEXT /* List of equipment IDs installed in the zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., Hourly, Daily) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting frequency */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of each reporting period in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frequency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frequency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Joules, Kilowatts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule */,
  "schedule_description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the schedule is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone for which the consumption data is recorded */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report associated with the consumption data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded consumption */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Value of the consumption measured */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy meter that recorded the consumption */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., solar, grid) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the consumption record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the consumption record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES energy_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, energy analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
